org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class DefaultProbe

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.DefaultProbe
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Probe
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
 class DefaultProbe
extends Object
implements Probe
    A probe permits to obtain information on agents.

    A probe must not be invasive and the agent is able to ignore them (ie. to not provide information).

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

      Deprecated. 
      Remove all the values.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      boolean getProbeBool(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as boolean (if possible).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as character (if possible).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the identifier of the probed agent.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as double (if possible).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as float (if possible).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as integer (if possible).
      long getProbeLong(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as integer (if possible).
      String[] getProbeNames()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the names of the probed values inside the agent.
      String getProbeString(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value as string (if possible).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      <T> T getProbeValue(String probeName, Class<T> clazz)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      boolean hasProbeValue(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if the specified probe value exists.
      boolean hasProbeValues()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this probe contains a value.
      boolean isProbedAgentAlive()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if the agent is alive.
      void putProbeValue(String probeName, Object value)
      Deprecated. 
      Store the value associated to a probe name.
      void removeProbeValue(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Remove a value from this probe.

    • Method Detail

      • getProbeNames

        public final String[] getProbeNames()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the names of the probed values inside the agent.
        Specified by:
        getProbeNames in interface Probe
        Returns:
        the names of the probed values inside the agent.

      • getProbeValue

        protected Object getProbeValue(String probeName)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value
        Returns:
        the value

      • getProbeArray

        public <T> T[] getProbeArray(String probeName,
                    Class<T> clazz)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Specified by:
        getProbeArray in interface Probe
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the value to reply.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        clazz - is the type of the expected value.
        Returns:
        the value or null

      • putProbeValue

        public void putProbeValue(String probeName,
                 Object value)
        Deprecated. 
        Store the value associated to a probe name.

        This method is generally invoked from the agent.

        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        value - is the value of the probe.

      • removeProbeValue

        public void removeProbeValue(String probeName)
        Deprecated. 
        Remove a value from this probe.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.

      • clearProbeValues

        public void clearProbeValues()
        Deprecated. 
        Remove all the values.

      • hasProbeValues

        public boolean hasProbeValues()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this probe contains a value.
        Specified by:
        hasProbeValues in interface Probe
        Returns:
        true if a probe value exists, otherwise false

      • getProbeValue

        public final <T> T getProbeValue(String probeName,
                  Class<T> clazz)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Specified by:
        getProbeValue in interface Probe
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the value to reply.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        clazz - is the type of the expected value.
        Returns:
        the value or null

        public boolean isProbedAgentAlive()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if the agent is alive.
